# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository uses **Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)** to document all major architectural decisions and patterns.

## 📚 Before coding, please review:

1. **[Architecture Decision Records](/docs/adr/)** - All technical decisions are documented here
2. **[Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)** - Rules for commits, branches, and code style

These documents are the single source of truth for how to work with this project. When in doubt, refer to them.

## 🔑 Key Principles

- Read the ADRs first
- Follow the Contributing Guidelines
- One source of truth: Do not repeat yourself, don't duplicate information across documentation
